info.title: Job Tracker API
info.description:
REST API for the Mini-SaaS Job Application Tracker. Manage job applications, notes, tasks, contacts, and more.

## Authentication
All endpoints require authentication via NextAuth JWT session. Include the session cookie in requests.

## Multi-tenant Data Isolation
All queries are automatically scoped to the authenticated user. Users can only access their own data.

## Soft Deletes
Records are soft-deleted (marked with `deletedAt` timestamp) rather than permanently removed.

tags.name: Documents
tags.description: Resume, cover letter, and document management

get.description: Get a paginated list of job applications for the authenticated user

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search in company name, job title, and location

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Filter applications applied after this date

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Filter applications applied before this date

get.description: Get a single job application by ID

delete.description: Soft delete an application and all related records (notes, tasks, contacts, links)

get.description: Export all applications as CSV. Requires Pro plan.

parameters.name: applicationId
parameters.description: Application ID to get notes for

Get user's documents (resumes, cover letters, etc.)
